svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="iX8nEByz9f7HRcFt6IK6" name="Page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1585" dy="811" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1654" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="import_bg" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;" value="📥 文档导入流程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="560" width="240" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n1" parent="import_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="PDF / MD 上传" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="import_bg" source="n1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="import_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="PDF → Markdown
MinerU 解析" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="20" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="import_bg" source="n2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="import_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="图片处理 & 文档切分" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="20" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="import_bg" source="n3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n4" parent="import_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="向量生成
BGE-M3（稠密 + 稀疏）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="20" y="350" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4a" edge="1" parent="import_bg" source="n4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n5a"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4b" edge="1" parent="import_bg" source="n4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="n5b"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5a" parent="import_bg" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Milvus
向量数据库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="90" x="10" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5b" parent="import_bg" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Neo4j
知识图谱" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="90" x="120" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query_bg" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;rounded=1;" value="💬 查询流程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="760" width="660" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q1" parent="query_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="用户提问" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="230" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq1" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q2" parent="query_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="商品名确认
LLM 提取 + Milvus 向量匹配对齐" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="180" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq2" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q3a"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq2b" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q3b"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq2c" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q3c"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq2d" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q3d"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="parallel_bg" parent="query_bg" style="swimlane;startSize=25;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;rounded=1;" value="四路并行检索" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="620" x="20" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3a" parent="parallel_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="向量检索
BGE-M3 稠密+稀疏" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="10" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3b" parent="parallel_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="HyDE 检索
假设性文档扩增" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="160" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3c" parent="parallel_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="知识图谱检索
Neo4j 实体关系" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="310" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q3d" parent="parallel_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="网络搜索
Tavily MCP" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="460" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq3a" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q3a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq3b" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q3b" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq3c" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q3c" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq3d" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q3d" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q4" parent="query_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="RRF 倒数排名融合" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="250" x="205" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq4" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q5" parent="query_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=12;" value="BGE-Reranker 重排序
分差截断过滤低相关文档" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="300" x="180" y="530" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eq5" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="q5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" target="q6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="q6" parent="query_bg" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="LLM 生成答案
SSE 流式推送 / 非流式返回" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="180" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mongo" parent="query_bg" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="MongoDB
历史对话" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="90" x="530" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="emongo" edge="1" parent="query_bg" source="mongo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;dashed=1;endArrow=open;" target="q2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
